CustomField.description: Formula-generated date set to the first day of the login month/year, enabling relative date filtering in reports (e.g. THIS_YEAR, LAST_N_MONTHS).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: First day of the month (e.g. 2026-01-01 for January 2026). Use this in report filters with relative dates like THIS_YEAR.
CustomField.label: Reporting Date
